update_results.path: Root > Itinerary_Version 2 > Day 3 > Art Gallery of Ontario

description.from: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.
description.to: Large museum featuring natural history, world cultures, and extensive permanent collections including dinosaurs, minerals, and cultural artifacts. Indoor exhibits spanning archaeology, paleontology, and decorative arts.
